Home›Community

Our Community

Giving back to the communities that trust us with their most precious moments.

Ubuntu in Action

More than a business — a community partner.

At Mamoratwa Wa Afrika, we believe our responsibility extends beyond the services we provide. The communities that trust us during their most vulnerable moments deserve to see us showing up for them in every season — not just in grief.

From sponsoring local events to supporting schools and youth programmes, we invest in the wellbeing of the communities we serve across North West Province and beyond.

Our Initiatives

Community Projects

[ Replace with project photo ]
Education
School Stationery Drive
Every year at the start of the school year, we partner with local primary schools in Zeerust and Mafikeng to donate stationery packs to learners from underprivileged households. Education is the greatest investment we can make in our communities.
[ Replace with project photo ]
Food Security
Grocery Relief Programme
During the winter months, we identify vulnerable elderly members of the community and coordinate grocery hamper donations. No one should face hunger, especially those who have given so much to our communities through the years.
[ Replace with project photo ]
Youth Development
Career Day Sponsorships
We sponsor and participate in school career days to introduce learners to careers in funeral services, administration, logistics, and community care — sectors that are essential but often overlooked in career guidance.
[ Replace with project photo ]
Cultural Preservation
Traditional Ceremony Support
We actively support and respect traditional African burial and mourning customs, working closely with families and community elders to ensure ceremonies honour cultural heritage alongside modern funeral practices.

Get Involved

Want to partner with us on community initiatives?

Whether you are a school, NGO, business, or individual, we welcome community partnerships that uplift our people.
